title: gh-129766: Fix crash on calling `warnings._release_lock` with no lock
author: sobolevn
body:
After:

```python
>>> import warnings
>>> warnings._release_lock()
Traceback (most recent call last):
  File "<python-input-1>", line 1, in <module>
    warnings._release_lock()
    ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~^^
RuntimeError: cannot release un-acquired lock
```

Refs https://github.com/python/cpython/pull/128386
Refs https://github.com/python/cpython/issues/128384

<!-- gh-issue-number: gh-129766 -->
* Issue: gh-129766
<!-- /gh-issue-number -->
